caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business or entrepreneurship, given the context of the show's title. The overall atmosphere suggests an informal yet professional discussion.
